description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 16 hrs 32 mins of coding time, averaging 2 hrs 23 mins per day. His WakaTime activity was primarily in Java (53%), with Markdown (18%) and Other (28%) also making up part of the week. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the provided data.
